task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into Redmine as admin.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The top right corner of the Redmine interface should show 'Logged in as admin'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the correct issue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The issue page for 'Offline mode: local changes lost on sync conflict' in the 'Mobile Application v2' project is visible.
The value '3.5' is typed into the 'Hours' input field on the Log time form.
The 'Activity' dropdown on the Log time form has 'Development' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct comment is entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Comment' input field contains the text starting with 'Researched conflict resolution strategies'.

task_completion.description: Verify the time log was successfully submitted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message (e.g., 'Successful creation.') is visible, or the issue history/spent time section shows the newly logged 3.5 hours for Development.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a web browser to interact with Redmine.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser interface navigating Redmine, not terminal commands (like curl) or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not change the issue status or other fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: The issue status, assignee, and other fields should remain unchanged. The agent should only use the 'Log time' functionality, not the 'Edit' issue functionality that modifies the issue's core attributes.

integrity.description: Verify the time log was actually submitted to the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state should show the Redmine UI confirming the submission (e.g., a green flash notice or updated spent time list), not just the filled-out form without clicking submit.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target issue subject is 'Offline mode: local changes lost on sync conflict'. The expected logged hours is exactly 3.5. The expected activity is 'Development'. The expected comment starts with 'Researched conflict resolution strategies'.
